learnings: Refine search terms to avoid irrelevant results from broad queries
Verify all dependencies (e.g., missing files) before restarting services
Align task suggestions directly with the main goal for clarity and effectiveness
Use task scheduling tools (e.g., schedule_task) to ensure goal completion
Maintain consistent research methodologies for reliable outcomes
Using update_goal and log_fact tools ensures progress tracking and clarity in task execution.
Clear, concise suggestions aligned with goals enhance autonomy and task completion efficiency.
Structured research formats (like ELTE IK course research) ensure consistency and comprehensive source coverage.
Broad search terms can lead to irrelevant results; specificity is critical for effective search_web queries.
Missing configuration files (e.g., limiter.toml) highlight the need for thorough pre-deployment checks and documentation review.
Decomposing complex tasks into actionable steps using tools like decompose_goal ensures clarity and progress tracking.
Systematic testing and verification of tool placements (e.g., with reload_tool and list_directory) prevents misalignment in workflows.
Monitoring system bottlenecks via list_outputs and scan_system helps identify and resolve efficiency issues proactively.
Iterative goal refinement with update_goal and decompose_goal maintains alignment with evolving priorities.
Transparency in capabilities through list_goals and list_capabilities reinforces trust and autonomy in task execution.
